reviews.review_title: A fun little MR game for the holidays!
reviews.review_description: It's a simple but fun experience and it was free so no complaints! You shoot nasty gnomes and they throw snoballs at you slowly enough for you to be able to dodge them. As a bonus you can put anyone's face on the gnomes if you really want to. Takes some tinkering but it's possible. So if you want to shoot snowballs at someone in particular for some reason, well this is your game.
